content.speakerText: Just pull the paper out gently from the back, then hit reset.
content.speakerTextCn: 从后面轻轻把纸拉出来，再按重置键。
expectedAnswers: So, back panel, pull slowly, then reset—got it!
I'll pull the paper from the back gently and press reset.
Let me confirm: pull from the back, then hit reset. Understood.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：准确复述了两个操作步骤
语言准确性：使用了正确的动词（pull, hit/press）和介词（from）
表达自然度：使用了口语确认语气（got it!/understood）
关键词覆盖：包含 'back', 'pull', 'reset' 等核心词汇

content.speakerText: First, disconnect the power cable. Then, remove the cover and clean the filter.
content.speakerTextCn: 首先，断开电源线。然后，取下盖子并清洁滤网。
expectedAnswers: So, unplug it, take off the cover, and clean the filter—got it!
I'll disconnect the power, remove the cover, and clean the filter.
Confirming: disconnect power → remove cover → clean filter. Understood.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：完整复述三个步骤且顺序正确
语言准确性：使用了恰当的操作动词（disconnect, remove, clean）
表达自然度：使用了确认语气或结构化复述
关键词覆盖：包含 'power', 'cover', 'filter' 等关键名词
